description:
Damaged fragment of a bill of loan. Partial signatures: [... Hako]hen b. Sa'id, Khalfon b. [...], Bahalul, Avraham ha-Sh[ar?]. 
 on Verso  the beginning of another deed, probably ketubah, but only the invocation בשמך רחמנא is legible. It seems to have few words from the date, but it is too faded. AA
description_he: מסמך משפטי בעברית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
